name: Cream Cheese Pie Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, cream cheese, and vanilla in a mixer or processor.
2. Reduce speed to low and add flour. Mix until just incorporated.
3. Remove the dough from the mixer and form into 3 balls.
4. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and chill for one hour before using.
5. Uncooked dough can be frozen for up to 2 months. Freeze uncooked balls of dough or freeze dough in pie tins.
6. Makes 3 (10-inch) pies.
